'''Timmser''' was a tall [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] with short blond hair. She was a [[Clutch (fighter)|tri-fighter]] [[pilot]] flying with the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang, specifically their [[Rock Squadron]]. Prior to this she had been a member of [[Riistar's Raiders]], another band operating with the [[Invids]] and stationed on [[Courkrus]].

When [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] in his cover role as [[Jenos Idanian]] infiltrated the Survivors in the quest to find his wife [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax]], Timmser was one of his wingmates within Rock Squadron. She was adept at piloting and proved to be an aggressive flier; though she was known to be quite assertive among her fellow pilots and raiders, she was nonetheless thought of by Corran to have had potential to be a better person. During his time on Courkrus, the two became friends. When Corran was promoted to leader of [[Bolt Squadron (Khuiumin Survivors)|Bolt Squadron]] at [[Leonia Tavira|Admiral Tavira's]] insistence, Timmser replaced him as leader of Rock Squadron.

When Corran's other alias—the mysterious "Ghost Jedi"—began making its presence felt among [[The Aviary (Courkrus)|the Aviary]], Timmser, along with [[Caet Shrovl]], fled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in a pair of tri-fighters that had been outfitted with salvaged [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
